title: Epigenomics of Neural Cells: REST-Induced Down- and Upregulation of Gene Expression in a Two-Clone PC12 Cell Model.
author: Garcia-Manteiga JM Bonfiglio S Malosio ML Lazarevic D Stupka E Cittaro D Meldolesi J
content: S-EPMC4564578 PMC4564578 Epigenomics of Neural Cells: REST-Induced Down- and Upregulation of Gene Expression in a Two-Clone PC12 Cell Model. Cell epigenomics depends on the marks released by transcription factors operating via the assembly of complexes that induce focal changes of DNA and histone
